ew_context: Price completing wave 4 correction with ascending triangle suggesting impulsive wave 5 breakout imminent
pattern_desc: Ascending triangle with horizontal resistance at 119.26 and rising support from 96.25. Multiple touches confirm validity of pattern structure.
invalidation: Break below 96.25 support invalidates the ascending triangle pattern
market_context: US blockade of Iranian ports creating severe supply concerns - oil prices set to surge on geopolitical tensions
